moments.title: World Cup Final Week
moments.blurb: The final stages of the FIFA World Cup 2026 are underway, culminating in the final match on Sunday, July 19th in New York/New Jersey.

angles.name: General Excitement
angles.copy: It's World Cup Final week! Who are you backing to lift the trophy on Sunday?

angles.name: Countdown to Final
angles.copy: Only 3 days until the biggest game in football! The World Cup Final kicks off this Sunday, July 19th.

moments.title: Brian May turns 79
moments.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday this Sunday, July 19th.

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the legendary Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

angles.name: Iconic Riffs
angles.copy: From 'Bohemian Rhapsody' to 'We Will Rock You', Brian May's riffs are iconic. Celebrating his 79th this Sunday!

moments.title: Carlos Santana turns 79
moments.blurb: Iconic guitarist Carlos Santana, known for his unique blend of rock, Latin, and blues, celebrates his 79th birthday on Monday, July 20th.

angles.name: Rhythm & Blues Legend
angles.copy: Feeling the rhythm! Happy 79th Birthday to the one and only Carlos Santana on Monday. What's your go-to Santana track?

angles.name: Still Bringing Fire
angles.copy: 79 years young and still bringing the fire! Celebrating the legendary Carlos Santana this Monday.

moments.title: Don Henley turns 79
moments.blurb: The Eagles' co-founder, drummer, and vocalist Don Henley celebrates his 79th birthday on Tuesday, July 21st.

angles.name: Eagles Icon
angles.copy: Take It Easy, it's Don Henley's 79th Birthday on Tuesday! What's your favourite Eagles song with him on vocals?

angles.name: Unmistakable Voice
angles.copy: From 'Hotel California' to 'Boys of Summer', Don Henley's voice is unmistakable. Happy 79th this Tuesday!

moments.title: Cat Stevens (Yusuf Islam) turns 78
moments.blurb: Folk rock legend Cat Stevens, also known as Yusuf Islam, celebrates his 78th birthday on Tuesday, July 21st.

angles.name: Folk Rock Legend
angles.copy: Oh Very Young! Happy 78th Birthday to the incredible Cat Stevens (Yusuf Islam) on Tuesday. Which of his classics moves you most?

angles.name: Timeless Music
angles.copy: From 'Wild World' to 'Father and Son', celebrating the timeless music of Cat Stevens on his 78th birthday this Tuesday.

moments.title: Danny Jones turns 40
moments.blurb: McFly guitarist and singer Danny Jones, also a coach on The Voice Kids, celebrates his 40th birthday on Wednesday, July 22nd.

angles.name: McFly Milestone
angles.copy: It's a big one! Happy 40th Birthday to McFly's very own Danny Jones on Wednesday! What's your favourite McFly tune?

angles.name: Still Looking Young
angles.copy: Celebrating Danny Jones turning the big 4-0 this Wednesday! Still looking younger than he should. 🎉

moments.title: Slash turns 61
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses iconic guitarist Slash celebrates his 61st birthday on Thursday, July 23rd.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 61st Birthday to the guitar god, Slash! What's your all-time favourite GNR riff?

angles.name: Legendary Solos
angles.copy: From 'Sweet Child o' Mine' to 'November Rain', Slash's solos are legendary. Celebrating his 61st this Thursday!

moments.title: Latitude Festival kicks off
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival, featuring a diverse line-up of music, comedy, and arts, begins next Thursday, July 23rd, in Henham Park, Suffolk.

angles.name: Festival Excitement
angles.copy: Who's heading to Latitude Festival next week? The Suffolk fields are calling for four days of music and arts starting Thursday!

angles.name: Countdown On
angles.copy: The countdown to Latitude Festival is on! Get ready for an incredible line-up starting next Thursday, July 23rd.

moments.title: Jennifer Lopez turns 57
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez, known for her music, acting, and dance, celebrates her 57th birthday on Friday, July 24th.

angles.name: J.Lo's Day
angles.copy: Jenny from the Block is 57! Happy Birthday to the incredible Jennifer Lopez on Friday. What's your favourite J.Lo hit?

angles.name: Still Amazing
angles.copy: Still looking amazing at 57! Celebrating the one and only J.Lo this Friday. Get on the dancefloor!

moments.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
moments.blurb: The Rolling Stones' legendary frontman Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday on Saturday, July 25th.

angles.name: Rock & Roll Legend
angles.copy: Can you believe it? Mick Jagger turns 83 on Saturday! Happy Birthday to the ultimate rock and roll legend. What's your favourite Stones track?

angles.name: Still Got The Moves
angles.copy: Still got the moves at 83! Celebrating the one and only Mick Jagger this Saturday. Yeah!

moments.title: Roger Taylor turns 77
moments.blurb: Queen's drummer and co-songwriter Roger Taylor celebrates his 77th birthday on Sunday, July 26th.

angles.name: Drumming Powerhouse
angles.copy: Happy 77th Birthday to Queen's drumming powerhouse, Roger Taylor, this Sunday! What's your favourite Queen track he sang lead on?

angles.name: Queen's Influence
angles.copy: From 'Radio Ga Ga' to 'A Kind of Magic', Roger Taylor's influence on Queen is massive. Celebrating his 77th this Sunday!

moments.title: Steelhouse Festival in Wales
moments.blurb: The UK's highest festival, Steelhouse, dedicated to classic rock and metal, takes place in Ebbw Vale, Wales, starting Friday, July 24th.

angles.name: Welsh Rock Calling
angles.copy: Calling all rock fans! Steelhouse Festival kicks off this Friday in Wales. Who's ready for a weekend of epic riffs on the mountain?

angles.name: Mountain of Rock
angles.copy: The Welsh mountains are alive with the sound of rock! Steelhouse Festival returns to Ebbw Vale this weekend for an unforgettable experience.

moments.title: Love Island UK heating up
moments.blurb: The latest series of Love Island UK continues to deliver drama and romance nightly, keeping viewers hooked as the summer progresses.

angles.name: Daily Drama
angles.copy: Another night, another dose of Love Island drama! What's got you talking from the villa tonight?

angles.name: Favourite Couples
angles.copy: Who's your favourite couple in the Love Island villa right now? The summer of love continues!

moments.title: UK Summer Holidays in full swing
moments.blurb: With schools across the UK now breaking up, the summer holidays are officially in full swing for many families.

angles.name: School's Out
angles.copy: School's out for summer! If you're on your holidays now, what are your big plans?

angles.name: Great British Summer
angles.copy: The great British summer holidays are here! Wishing everyone a fantastic break, wherever you're heading.
